description: [ELON] Add proper error handling and logging to time-entries routes. Wrap database queries in try-catch blocks. Log specific error details (error type, message, stack trace) to help diagnose database connection issues. Return structured error responses.
successCriteria: All route handlers have try-catch blocks
Errors are logged with structured context
Errors return proper JSON shape: { success: false, error: { message, code } }
HTTP status codes match error types (500 for DB errors)
